organization.name: Belastingdienst
organization.description: Belastingdienst is the Dutch Tax and Customs Administration. The organization consists of several divisions, including Tax Administration, Customs, Benefits, the Fiscal Intelligence and Investigation Service (FIOD), and supporting services. With over 30,000 employees across the Netherlands, it is responsible for levying, collecting, and auditing taxes, administering benefits, carrying out customs duties, and investigating fraud.
